scripts.generate:hls:mobile: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force './public/video/hls' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path './public/video/hls/mobile_480p' | Out-Null; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path './public/video/hls/mobile_720p' | Out-Null; ffmpeg -y -i './public/Technika Intro Page Video.mp4' -filter_complex '[0:v]split=2[v480][v720];[v480]scale=w=854:h=480:force_original_aspect_ratio=decrease,pad=854:480:(ow-iw)/2:(oh-ih)/2[v480out];[v720]scale=w=1280:h=720:force_original_aspect_ratio=decrease,pad=1280:720:(ow-iw)/2:(oh-ih)/2[v720out]' -map '[v480out]' -c:v:0 libx264 -preset veryfast -profile:v:0 main -b:v:0 1200k -maxrate:v:0 1400k -bufsize:v:0 2400k -g 48 -keyint_min 48 -sc_threshold 0 -map '[v720out]' -c:v:1 libx264 -preset veryfast -profile:v:1 high -b:v:1 2600k -maxrate:v:1 3200k -bufsize:v:1 5200k -g 48 -keyint_min 48 -sc_threshold 0 -an -f hls -hls_time 4 -hls_playlist_type vod -hls_flags independent_segments -hls_segment_type fmp4 -hls_fmp4_init_filename 'init.mp4' -master_pl_name 'mobile-master.m3u8' -var_stream_map 'v:0,name:480p v:1,name:720p' -hls_segment_filename './public/video/hls/mobile_%v/segment_%03d.m4s' './public/video/hls/mobile_%v/prog.m3u8'"
